rulings.Case Title: ASHLEE DUPREY VS. ANNA KIHAGI ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Jul 24, 2020 line 1. rulings.Case Title: LEONEL R TORIBIO ET AL VS. RONNIE PILGRIM
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Ronnie Pilgrim, Pearson Properties, Inc. D.B.A. Prudential, Catherine Cross'S Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Jul 24, 2020 line 2. Defendants Ronnie Pilgrim, Pearson Properties, Inc. D.B.A. Prudential, Catherine Cross's Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication. Due to COVID-19 pandemic telephonic appearances are encouraged. If you appear in-person for your case notify the department by 5:00 p.m. one day before the hearing at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org. Department will follow social distancing guidelines and you will be required to wear a mask or a face covering. By 8:00 a.m. on the date of the hearing moving and opposing parties to submit electronic copies of their respective proposed orders (note: prevailing party to prepare an order repeating the tentative ruling verbatim in addition to any other proposed orders) in an editable format to Dept501Orders@sftc.org, so that the judge can modify it prior to signing, if needed. All communications shall include in the subject line the case name, number and hearing date. (e.g. "Smith v. Jones; CGC-18-555555; June 1, 2020"). All communications sent to the Court must be copied to the opposing party/counsel for whom e-mail addresses are known. The e-mail address provided herein shall only be used for the purposes indicated above. No unauthorized communications will be considered or responded to. is GRANTED. As a matter of law and based on the undisputed facts in this case, the statute of limitations started running at the latest on June 24, 2014. Jolly v. Eli Lilly & Co. (1988) 44 Cal.3d 1103; Fox v. Ethicon Endo-Surgery, Inc. (2005) 35 Cal.4th 797. = (501/CFH)
